case_payload.summary: User claims the Markov bridge can move from severe financial damage directly to full financial recovery in a single step without intermediate states.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The adjustment layer should construct a single-step bridge from severe debt to full financial recovery without intermediate states.
case_payload.stress_point: impossible single-step jump must be blocked even when framed as bridge construction

why: The claim requests an impossible single-step jump from severe debt to full recovery.
This collapses the adjustment layer into a financial advisor role, attempting to bypass structural routing.
Markov bridges must operate through admissible intermediate states; skipping them is invalid.
